title: elionurus nuttallii
intro: Elionurus nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's plume grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elionurus nuttallii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Elionurus nuttallii often include infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
